feature.title: DRV PNK Stadium
feature.summary: MGV served as the surveying consultant for the development of DRV PNK Stadium, supporting a fast-paced, highly coordinated project for Inter Miami CF.
feature.imageAlt: Construction surveying team on an active project site
feature.author: MG Vera Team
body: Manuel G. Vera & Associates, Inc. (MGV) played a vital role as the surveying consultant for the development of DRV PNK Stadium, home of Inter Miami CF.

Built on the historic site of the former Lockhart Stadium in Fort Lauderdale, the project marked the launch of Inter Miami CF into Major League Soccer. With an aggressive schedule leading up to the 2020 inaugural season, the stadium was delivered through a fast-paced, highly coordinated effort that brought together multiple disciplines and teams working toward a common goal.

MGV was part of that effort every step of the way, collaborating closely with engineers, contractors, and stakeholders from initial planning through final construction. Our team provided critical surveying and mapping services, including control surveys, topographic mapping, and construction layout, helping keep the project accurate, aligned, and on schedule.
Delivering a stadium under tight timelines requires precision, coordination, and adaptability, and this project checked every box.

From the first stake in the ground to game day, MGV is proud to have contributed to a landmark venue that brings people together, uniting the community through the passion and energy of soccer in South Florida.

articles.title: Miami-Dade County Public Schools Contract
articles.summary: MGV has been selected as one of the firms awarded RFQ-204 for Land Surveying and Mapping Services with Miami-Dade County Public Schools.
articles.imageAlt: Miami-Dade County Public Schools contract announcement
articles.author: MG Vera Team
body: Manuel G. Vera & Associates, Inc. (MGV) has been selected by Miami-Dade County Public Schools as one of the firms awarded Contract RFQ-204 for Land Surveying and Mapping Services.

Miami-Dade County Public Schools is the fourth-largest school district in the United States, serving over 330,000 students across more than 500 schools and educational centers. Through this contract, MGV will support the district's ongoing and future projects by providing accurate, reliable surveying and mapping services in accordance with industry standards.
This selection reflects MGV's continued commitment to delivering high-quality services and supporting essential infrastructure and educational facilities throughout South Florida.

articles.title: Islamorada Contract
articles.summary: MGV has been awarded a contract with Islamorada, reinforcing its long-standing presence and project experience throughout Monroe County and the Florida Keys.
articles.author: MG Vera Team
body: Manuel G. Vera & Associates, Inc. (MGV) has been awarded a contract with Islamorada.

MGV brings more than 40 years of experience working throughout Monroe County across the Florida Keys, demonstrating a long-standing presence and deep familiarity with local conditions, regulations, and project requirements.
This award reinforces MGV's long-standing relationship with Monroe County and its commitment to supporting critical infrastructure and community development initiatives.

articles.title: FDOT District 6 Contract
articles.summary: MGV has been awarded a Districtwide Miscellaneous Location Survey contract with the Florida Department of Transportation District 6.
articles.author: MG Vera Team
body: Manuel G. Vera & Associates, Inc. (MGV) has been awarded a Districtwide Miscellaneous Location Survey contract with the Florida Department of Transportation District 6.
With over 30 years of experience working with FDOT, MGV currently manages multiple continuing contracts in District 6, reinforcing its strong presence and proven performance across South Florida.
MGV appreciates the opportunity to support FDOT District 6 and looks forward to contributing to the success of upcoming projects.

articles.title: FDOT District 2 Contract
articles.summary: MGV has been awarded a contract with the Florida Department of Transportation District 2, supporting transportation work with surveying, mapping, and SUE services.
articles.author: MG Vera Team
body: Manuel G. Vera & Associates, Inc. (MGV) has been awarded a contract with the Florida Department of Transportation District 2.
This award highlights MGV's ability to support complex transportation projects by providing accurate surveying, mapping, and Subsurface Utility Engineering (SUE) services tailored to district needs.
MGV appreciates the opportunity to support FDOT District 2 and looks forward to contributing to the successful delivery of future projects.

articles.title: Corporate Run 2026
articles.summary: MGV proudly participated in the annual Lexus Corporate Run in downtown Miami, joining thousands of professionals for wellness, team building, and community engagement.
articles.imageAlt: MG Vera team participating in Corporate Run 2026
articles.author: MG Vera Team
body: Manuel G. Vera & Associates, Inc. (MGV) proudly participated in the annual Lexus Corporate Run, one of South Florida's largest and most anticipated corporate fitness events.

Held in downtown Miami, the Corporate Run brings together thousands of professionals each year to promote wellness, team building, and community engagement. MGV had a great time representing the team and joining other local organizations in this long-standing tradition.

Congratulations to Ismel Suria for achieving the fastest time within the company. This event highlights MGV's commitment not only to professional excellence, but also to fostering a strong, active, and connected team culture.
